last_completed.summary: G3: hint_config_v1 expansion beyond policy.allow — loader parses defaults/mocks/generators with unknown-key warns; planner consumes defaults via PerTargetHints.Defaults precedence and generators via runtime-values registry; mocks emitted as deterministic MockSpec artifacts (substitution at execute time deferred to str-8v66). 7 loader tests + 11 planner tests including 2 rapid property tests. Pre-existing cli:clippy failure unrelated (str-7syr).
